items.text:
[COLL FOR MODELS] Berlin 🇩🇪 | May 30 – June 5

I’ll be in Berlin from May 30 to June 5 and I’m looking for high-quality female collaborators.
The Vision: My expertise lies in expressive portraiture and artistic nude photography, often blending the human figure with natural scenery.
While my portfolio features bold artistic nude work, I am equally open to shooting high-end portraits, fashion, or lifestyle with models who bring strong expression and creativity to the table. It’s all about the mood and the art!

Message me directly with your portfolio/IG.

IG: @hughleo1994

sharedPost.text:
Hoy un poco de clase de Samri.
Recorremos este arte folclórico lleno de historias desde Najdi hasta Al- Zubair . 
Es un arte lleno de pertenencia que  se ha mantenido vivo a lo largo del tiempo y migraciones. 

#samri #iraqidance
#Iraqifolk #marielzahraale #najd

items.text:
Acteur kind (3-5) gezocht voor Comercial 
Hallo! 

Voor een examencommercial over prestatiedruk onder moeders zijn wij op zoek naar acteurs die willen meewerken aan een warm en betekenisvol verhaal rondom “sisterhood”.

Opnamedatum: 8 mei

Locatie: Amsterdam (voorkeur voor acteurs uit Amsterdam i.v.m. planning)

Wij zoeken:

• Kind (3–5 jaar)

Het project is een schoolopdracht, dus er is helaas geen vergoeding. Wel bieden wij:

• Reiskostenvergoeding

• Goede catering

• Een leuke en professionele setervaring

• Een mooie bijdrage aan een maatschappelijk relevant onderwerp

• Gebruik van het beeldmateriaal voor je reel/CV

Interesse of ken je iemand?

Stuur een mail naar: desairly.cijntje@student.ahk.nl 

We kijken uit naar jullie reacties!

London or ENGLAND South

Zoom Research on Utube

Incentive £105

Looking for 11 yr old female  who use utube  to give feedback and opinions by zoom. Parent /guardian must be present during both zooms

Meet & Greet Tues 5th May @ 4pm (30mins)

Main Session Tues 14th May @ 3.45pm (75mins)

Must reside in a postcode Midlands or Scotland.

Must use utube and social media 

To take part please pm me or email androullanicolaou2@gmail.com

POWERHOUSE CASTING IS ORGANIZING AN OPEN CALL IN SEARCH OF BODY DOUBLES FOR A SOCIAL MEDIA CAMPAIGN 

IF YOU MATCH ONE OF THE SPECS LISTED BELOW, YOU’LL RECEIVE $50.00 CAD FOR YOUR TIME ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6. 

IF YOU’RE CONFIRMED FOR THE JOB, COMPENSATION WILL BE $400.00 CAD FOR THE REHEARSAL DAY (MAY 8 OR 9***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR BOTH DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE) & $1200.00 CAD FOR THE SHOOT DAY (MAY 10 TO 12***YOU MUST BE AVAILABLE FOR ALL DATES, BUT WILL ONLY BE USED ON ONE). 

YOU MUST MATCH ONE OF THE ROLES BELOW TO RECEIVE THE $50.00 CAD AUDITION FEE

IF YOU FIT & ARE FULLY AVAILABLE FOR THE DATES, PLEASE COME TO REVIVAL STUDIOS (Revival Studios, Building E, 629 Eastern Ave, Toronto) 
ON WEDNESDAY, MAY 6 BETWEEN from 10:00AM UNTIL 5:00PM 

TALENT NEEDS TO BE AVAILABLE FOR MAY 8, 9, 10, 11 & 12)

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR…

1)
FEMALE 
WHITE
5’4” TO 5’6” IN HEIGHT
HIGH LEVEL SOCCER PLAYER ABLE TO DO KICK-UPS, FREESTYLE & AROUND-THE-WORLD. YOU MUST BE ABLE TO DEMONSTRATE THESE SKILLS ON-CAMERA. 

2)
MALE
BLACK
5’9” TO 5’12” IN HEIGHT 
SOFTER BUILD

3)
MALE
WHITE
5’8” TO 5’10” IN HEIGHT 
SLIGHT BUILD

CASTING CALL – PAID (LOS ANGELES)
Casting a female actor for a dramatic scene from Batman Forever (Dr. Meridian role).

Details:

• Female, 20–25 (or looks early–mid 20s)

• One-day shoot (date TBD)

• Rate: $200

• Non-union

Project:

University-level directing assignment. Dialogue-driven scene with strong emotional tone.

Additional:

• Copy, credit, and footage provided

• Small, professional set

To Submit:

Please DM with headshot, resume, and reel (if available)

items.text:
🚨CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (NON-UNION, ATL)
Synopsis

A romantic drama that follows the lives of Tay and Ted from when they meet at 6 years old, to their adult lives as they navigate life’s obstacles without letting it tear them apart.

SVS Productions 

Non-Union

Shoot Dates: June 5th-10th, 2026

Compensation: Copy/Credit/Meals

Location: Atlanta, GA

Local Atlanta hires only.

Submission Deadline: May 6th, 2026

Available Roles:

TAY CAMERON – LEAD

Black female, ages 25–35 (must be able to portray ages 18–30 throughout the film).

Beautiful, prissy, and driven. Tay knows exactly what she wants for her future, but struggles to balance her career ambitions with her relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with the character Ted. No full make-out scenes.

TED BURGESS – LEAD

Black male, ages 25–35, 5’10” and over.

Very caring and loving. Ted deeply loves Tay but is growing tired of her consistently putting her career before their relationship.

Please note: This role includes kissing pecks with Tay. No full make-out scenes.

YOUNG TED BURGESS – SUPPORTING

Black male, age 6-10. 

Ted meets Tay at this age and they develop a bond. He is caring and charismatic. 

SANDRA – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 40–50.

Ted’s mother. Outgoing, confident, and sexy.

LOGAN – SUPPORTING

Black male, ages 40–50.

Sandra’s husband. Well-dressed, educated, and polished.

GRANNY – SUPPORTING

Black female, ages 60–75.

Logan’s mother and Ted’s grandmother. She helped raise Ted and played a major role in shaping him into the gentleman he is today.

Submission Instructions

Please submit headshot, resume, reel & or demo clips (if available) to: miles@svsmobb.com. Subject Line: [Role Name] Submission

Break a leg!

sharedPost.text:
⚓ MALE DANCERS: ELEVATE YOUR CAREER AT SEA! ⚓
Are you a professionally trained Male Dancer with exceptional technique and a strong background in Classical Ballet and Contemporary? Ready to trade the studio for a stage that sails the world?

We are seeking polished and versatile male dancers to join our elite theatre ensembles on luxury cruise ships! This is your opportunity to perform in spectacular, high-energy productions while exploring global destinations.

The Spotlight Awaits:
Lead Performer in lavish theatre shows, dinner shows, special events, and high-impact pool shows.

Execute complex, fast-paced choreography with precision across multiple styles including Ballet, Modern, and Jazz.

Depending on suitability, integrate specialty artistic elements or routines (e.g., floor work or basic aerials) into the company's show formats.

Collaborate with the artistic team to create thrilling new performance pieces.

What We Are Looking For:
Exceptional Training: Completed certified performing arts training or similar professional qualification.

Classical Foundation: Strong professional training in Ballet, Modern, and Jazz dancing is essential.

Experience: Several years of professional stage production experience is highly desirable.

Versatility: Ability to learn choreography quickly and precisely; basic singing and acting training are a plus.

Language: Must be proficient in both spoken and written English.

Attitude: Highly motivated, a reliable team player, and focused on providing a world-class guest experience.

Don't let this opportunity sail by! Audition for a life-changing contract today.

🔗 View the full job description and APPLY NOW: https://www.5entertain.com/jobs/dancers-for-cruise-ships

#maledancer #dancerlife #CruiseShipPerformer #ballet #contemporarydance #jobsatsea #ApplyNow

What a fantastic group of singers, voice teachers and speech therapists you are! 🙌
Today we worked intensively on larynx height, AES, cricoid and thyroid tilt, jaw and lip movement, and anchoring – and I’m already looking forward to the next days together.

Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻 | Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶

Today we dove furthermore into the fascinating world of voice anatomy, practical aspects and acoustics. Alongside all the theory, there was plenty of practice, exchange, and shared learning – with joy, curiosity, and lots of aha moments guaranteed ✨

I’m really excited for Day 4 and 5 with you 🥳
Here’s to new insights, exciting exercises, and your continued vocal growth 💪🎤💫

📌Stimmtraining Anmeldung im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online

sharedPost.text:
Stimmtraining in Frankfurt am Main – online & vor Ort 🎤💻
Estill Voice Training – Level 1 🎶
Heute tauchen wir tief ein in die faszinierende Welt der Stimme 🤩
• Stimmlippen & ihre Schwingung 🎵
• Taschenfalten & ihre Funktionen 🔍
• Anatomie & Akustik verständlich erklärt 🧠
• Viel Praxis, Austausch & gemeinsames Lernen 💬
• Freude, Neugier & Aha-Momente garantiert ✨
Ich freue mich riesig auf Tag 2 mit euch 🥳
Auf neue Erkenntnisse, spannende Übungen und eure stimmliche Weiterentwicklung 💪🎤💫

📌Stimmtraining Anmeldung im Institut Rummel (Frankfurt), in Luxemburg oder Online
rummel@sing-teach.com | www.speak-teach.com | www.sing-teach.com

sharedPost.text:
Looking for something new and fun to do? That won’t cost the earth but leave you feeling amazing? 🤔

Come and move, laugh and stress bust with us! My BEGINNERS dance classes are for EVERYBODY. (I can’t stress this enough. Even if you think you can’t dance, in my sessions, we don’t care!) 

Just come have a go. We move for the joy of movement and all the benefits it can bring, not for perfection or to look good. (That happens all on its own, over time. 🙌 And if that’s something you’re striving for, then I’ll help you get there. 👌)

Thursday classes begin again on May 14th. Brand new routine, great time to grab a friend and try your first class for FREE!!!! 

Can’t make Thursdays? That’s ok, drop me a message about Monday classes! 🙌

#danceclasses #liverpoolfitness #beginnersdance #tryitchallenge #FreeClass #trybeforeyoubuy #newhobby #liverpooluk

🎬 ✨ भव्य घोषणा ✨ 🎬
आपल्याला कळविण्यात अत्यंत आनंद होत आहे की

लवकरच फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमधील कलाकार, तंत्रज्ञ आणि विविध क्षेत्रात कार्य करणाऱ्या सर्वांसाठी

एक नवीन आणि भव्य

🏛️ Association / Federation / Union किंवा महामंडळ

स्थापन करण्यात येत आहे.

🎭 कलाकार

🎬 तंत्रज्ञ

🎥 फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमध्ये कार्यरत सर्व व्यक्तींनी

आपले नाव नोंदणी करून या नव्या परिवाराचा भाग व्हावे.

🤝 आपल्या हक्कांसाठी • आपल्या प्रगतीसाठी • आपल्या एकतेसाठी

एक मजबूत व्यासपीठ निर्माण करण्याचा आमचा संकल्प.

🔥 पहिल्या 1000 सदस्यांसाठी सुवर्णसंधी 🔥

✨ सर्व इच्छुकांचे हार्दिक स्वागत आहे ✨

👤 रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख

🎬 फिल्म मेकर

📞 संपर्क : 98-5004-9002

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'भव्य घोषणा आपल्याला कळविण्यात अत्यंत आनंद होत आहे की लवकरच फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमधील कलाकार, तंत्रज्ञ आणि विविध क्षेत्रात कार्य करणाऱ्या सर्वासाठी एक नवीन आणि भव्य Association / Federation/ Union किंवा महामंडळ स्थापन करण्यात येत आहे. कलाकार तंत्रज्ञ फिल्म इंडस्ट्टरीमध्ये काम करणारे सर्वच आपले नाव नोंदणी करून या नव्या परिवाराचा भाग व्हावे. आपल्या हक्कांसाठी आपल्या प्रगतीसाठी आपल्या एकतेसाठी एक मजबूत व्यासपीठ निर्माण करण्याचा आमचा संकल्प. पहिल्या 1000 लोकांसाठी सुवर्णसंधी ၁ सर्व इच्छुकांचे हार्दिक स्वागत आहे रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख फिल्म मेकर संपर्क 9850049002'

sharedPost.text:
Do nowego filmu fabularnego poszukujemy dziewczyn 25-30 lat do roli przechodniów + w międzyczasie sesja do rekwizytu (zdjęcia z główną bohaterką jako koleżanki)

DATA: 10/05/2026
MIEJSCE: Warszawa
STAWKA: 170 zł netto gotówką po planie 

ZGŁOSZENIA:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com
W tytule maila: Dziewczyna 10/05 film

W treści: imię, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejsce zamieszkania, wzrost, wymiary: klatka/wzrost/biodra, rozmiar buta, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki

items.text:
PRZESMYK sezon 2 ostatni rozdział.                                                      

Od kilku miesięcy widzicie  FB Studio ABM relacje i ogłoszenia z realizacji tajemniczego serialu. Pewnie już wszyscy wiedzą , ale my dopiero dzisiaj możemy to ogłosić. Tak, to jest drugi sezon serialu PRZESMYK.  

W PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU ZAMIESZCZAMY link do formularza zgłoszeniowego. 

Zapraszamy do wypełniania go mieszkańców WARSZAWY i najbliższych okolic.  

Poszukujemy: 
komandosów - osób dobrze zbudowanych, wysokich, kulturystów, bokserów, zapaśników, judoków, doświadczonych zawodników jak i emerytowanych sportowcó. Zapraszamy panó i panie  w wieku 30-50 lat i  epizodystów - również w wieku 30-50 

Wszystkie szczegóły i stawki w formularzu zgoszeniowym. Link do niego w PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU.

TO JUŻ OSTATNIA SZANSA NA UDZIAŁ W DRUGIM SEZONIE  PRZESMYKU!!!

Studio ABM  najkrótsza droga na plan filmowy!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING – EPIZODYŚCI 🎬  zdjęcia w Warszawie (brak zwrotów za dojazd) 5 i 6 maja (do potwierdzenia data i informacja czy dana rola będzie miała 1 dzień czy 2 dni zdjęciowe - prosimy o zgłoszenia osoby w pełni dyspozycyjne  5 i 6 maja)

Do pilotażowego odcinka serialu fabularyzowanego (true crime / paradokument) poszukujemy epizodystów do poniższych ról:  

🔹 1. Podejrzany (epizod mówiony)  
Mężczyzna 29–35 lat, wschodni akcent/język (rosyjski/ukraiński mile widziany), dobrze zbudowany, „gangsterski” vibe.  
💰 700 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 2. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, zmęczony, niepewny, człowiek żyjący na marginesie 
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 3. Mechanik (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 39–50 lat, zwyczajny, konkretny, mile widziana ciemniejsza karnacja lub opalenizna.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 4. Rekruter (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, sprytny, kontaktowy, typ sprzedawcy.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 5. Ekspert (epizod mówiony)  
Osoba 40–65 lat, spokojny, precyzyjny głos, możliwa gra bez pokazywania twarzy.  
💰 560 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 6. Jarosław (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–35 lat, z zarostem.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 7. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
25–35 lat, ładna brunetka, naturalny wygląd.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 8. Dziewczynka (epizod niemy)  - tylko dzieci ze zgodą PIP w naszej agencji!
ok. 7 lat  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 9. Mężczyzna (epizod mówiony)  
ok. 60 lat, wschodni wygląd/język  
💰 490 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 10. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
50–65 lat, korpulentna  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 11. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna ok. 50 lat, wysoki, krępy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 12. Bezdomny (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 40–65 lat, z bujną brodą  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 13. Nadawca (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–55 lat, raczej postawny, może być typ ochroniarza  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 14. Policjant (epizod niemy)  
Funkcjonariusz / typ mundurowy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  

➡️ W tytule: PILOT  

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:  
1. Imię i nazwisko  
2. Miejsce zamieszkania  
3. Wiek  
4. Wzrost  
5. Rozmiar ubrania  
6. 2 zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka, aktualne!)  
7. Link do wizytówki / nagrania (YouTube)  
8. Podaj numer roli do której się zgłaszasz
⏰ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 01.05 do godz. 20:00  

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥

items.text:
**Casting Call: Paid Opportunity (Cape Town)**

We are currently casting for an upcoming production and are looking for the following talent:

**Lead Roles:**
1 x Male (25–35) – White or Latino (including Mexican heritage)
1 x Female (25–35) – White or Latino (including Mexican heritage)

**Featured Extras:**
2 x Individuals of Latino (including Mexican) heritage, male or female
2 x White individuals, male or female

**Shoot Details:**
Location: Cape Town
Date: Friday, 8 May
This is a paid opportunity. Lead roles: R5000 per day (all inclusive). Featured extras: R2500 per day

**Submission Details:**
Please email 2 recent headshots to: castingcallsouthafrica@gmail.com
Subject line: Your Name, Age, and Ethnicity

🎬 CASTING CALL | RELIABLE BACKGROUND TALENT NEEDED

DURBAN • JOHANNESBURG • CAPE TOWN

We are currently expanding our professional background talent database for upcoming Film, TV, Commercial, and Series productions across South Africa.

We are specifically seeking:
• Indian
• Coloured
• White
• Diverse professional talent
(All ages welcome)

Requirements:
• Reliable and punctual
• Professional on set
• Previous industry experience is advantageous
• Committed, responsive, and serious about production work

We are looking for individuals ready to work within professional film, television, and commercial environments.

Apply here:
https://forms.gle/3SdxUSuQWrrkHrTE8

Serious applicants only.

Join a trusted network supplying dependable talent to major productions nationwide.

items.text:
We’re looking for an editor to join us—someone who’s keen to be part of a strong creative collaboration, not just for this project but with the potential to continue working together on future films.

This is an unpaid opportunity, as we’re a group of industry professionals (across both cast and crew) bringing our individual skills together to build something collectively. It’s a great chance to get involved early, contribute creatively, and grow with the team.
For those unfamiliar, the 48 Hour Film Challenge is exactly what it sounds like: we’re given a random genre and have just 48 hours to write, shoot, and edit a short film.
The challenge runs from 6pm on 15th May to 6pm on 17th May. Due to the time constraints, we’re ideally looking for an editor who can be on set and edit as we go.
If you’re interested in being part of the team for this project (and potentially beyond), please comment below or get in touch.
Thanks,
Chris

topComments.text: I'm new here. Please could you explain why most of these jobs are unpaid?

🎨 Arts & Crafts Instructor Opportunity – Set Sail This Summer! 🚢  

Looking for a creative role with a unique twist? Join our team as an Arts & Crafts Instructor and bring your passion to life while working in an exciting cruise environment!  

✨ What’s on offer:  
• £525 per week  
• Contract: July – September/October (with opportunity for work in 2027)
• A chance to travel and inspire others through creativity  

📍 Recruitment Day: Milton Keynes, UK – May 12  

Ready to apply? Click below 👇  
https://airtable.com/apprpGBmZi559Ep9Z/shr41Hf3vdrYR4FEU  

#ArtsAndCrafts #CreativeJobs #CruiseJobs #HiringNow #SummerOpportunities

items.text:
We are casting lead & supporting roles for my short film 'Childlock', shooting late July this year. Though we are a low-budget production, this is a PAID opportunity for all roles.

To apply, send a short cover email, headshot & acting sample to childlockfilm@gmail.com.

Thanks for reading & please share!
.
.
.

items.text:
Hi Everyone!  SpectraLive (x) is casting for Los Angeles local talent to perform as licensed super hero characters and dancers this summer at Six Flags parks around the country! The production rehearses and opens in Los Angeles in mid-May and employment continues through the end of August.  

Auditions will we be held at Six Flags Magic Mountain on March 22 and 23. Please see the attached flyer for more information and to sign up: [https://tinylink.net/yTMIU](https://tinylink.net/yTMIU)

Looking forward to seeing you there!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'SÍX Flags Entertainment Corporation CHARACTER AUDITIONS Summer 2026 HERO VILLAINS require height and physical slim, athletic and Flags Magic Mountain: Touring Production: July- stage combat, martial DANCERS High and athletic with strong technique, excellent movement ability, Acrobatics, martial plus. huge plus. CHARACTERS energy with strong technique, EMCEES Life party, highly characters roles available. interaction Skills crowd work, improv, line and managementi huge plus. Local Touring Housing, SUNDAY, MARCH 22 10:00 am DANCERS pm WATCH NOW ACTORS MONDAY, SIX FLAGS 10:00 am 23 ACTORS pm DANCERS Valencia 91355 parking TUESDAY, MARCH 24 COSTUME submissions Advance! https://tinylink.net/yIMIU accepted. Questions: Casting@Spectralivex.com Jazzshoes'

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

Looking for 2 Black Men for short film

May 16th and 17th 
RIVERSIDE, CA 

Requirements:
•Must be the same exact height
Can be twins or two individuals of identical height/build
 •Age 20-30
• Strong physical awareness and ability to perform slow, precise movements
•Comfortable performing in full costume (all black wardrobe, ski masks)

Character Description:
•Silent, eerie, and controlled
•Move with purpose minimal but impactful
•Almost mechanical or in sync with one another

Additional Info:
•Filming will require coordination and timing between both performers
•No dialogue; performance is entirely physical

Please submit:
• Height (must match partner if applying as pair)
•Recent photos

**Unpaid but Meal and Credit will be provided

Email: Chippiecarcamo@yahoo.com

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Casting Call!
I am looking to assemble the cast for my next project, a short film titled "Stoplight Fever". Casting continues through this week and closes on Friday May 8th.

Filming in: Tampa Florida 

When: Mid-May 2026

Paid: There will be a form of compensation. 

Submissions accepted through May 8th, 2026

If you are interested please send a short, minimum 1 minute dramatic monologue to Justinwphillips@vistarapictures.com along with a head shot.

Also, if you know someone you think might be a great fit please consider sharing the information and spread the word. Thank your time and I cant wait to see you at the movies!

items.summary:
Casting Call!
I am looking to assemble the cast for my next project, a short film titled "Stoplight Fever". Casting continues through this week and closes on Friday May 8th.

Filming in: Tampa Florida 

When: Mid-May 2026

Paid: There will be a form of compensation. 

Submissions accepted through May 8th, 2026

If you are interested please send a short, minimum 1 minute dramatic monologue to Justinwphillips@vistarapictures.com along with a head shot.

Also, if you know someone you think might be a great fit please consider sharing the information and spread the word. Thank your time and I cant wait to see you at the movies!
items.title: Casting Call!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — STUDENT SHORT — VANCOUVER — MAY 30–31 WEEKEND
Casting a short political satire/comedy sketch filming in Vancouver over the weekend of May 30–31.

Project: Student short / comedy sketch

Genre: Political satire / absurd comedy

Location: Vancouver, BC

Shoot Date: May 30 or 31, exact day TBD 

Time Commitment: Approx. 2 hours

Pay: Small honorarium

Roles:

DONALD TRUMP — Male, 45+

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Looking for an actor/impressionist who can do a strong Trump impression, especially the voice, rhythm, ego, posture, and comedic timing. 

Does not need to be an exact lookalike, but resemblance is a plus.

DOCTOR — Female-presenting, 25–45

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Professional, composed, polite, slightly uncomfortable. Strong deadpan comedy ability is a plus.

BODYGUARD — Male-presenting, 25–50

Pay: $30 for approx. 2 hours

Silent role. Serious, still, intimidating presence.

Please send:

Headshot or recent photoReel/performance clips, if available

Trump impression clip, if applying for the Trump role

Role you’re interested in

Availability for May 30–31

DM me or email: borovinskiymax@gmail.com 

Thanks!

items.text:
**Rose Waite Studio** is looking for a man and his dog for a commercial. We’re specifically looking for someone with a friendliness, softness and warmth. *60s - early 70s, open to all ethnicities. *

**Fitting:** 21st May (London)

**Filming: **27th / 28th May (London)

Talent must be based in London or surrounding areas.

No previous experience needed to apply. Paid opportunity.

To apply, please email **[stories@rosewaite.com](mailto:stories@rosewaite.com)** with the subject ‘Commercial - Man and Dog’.

Please include:

Name / Location / Selfie

A picture of your dog

A few lines about you both

sharedPost.text:
Adult Panto Jack OFF The Beanstalk  is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

We are now casting for the following roles only 

Jack Trott
We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.
Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

Dame Trott - Male 
We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab 
Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

Billy Trott  -Male 
We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother 
Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

The Dates 
Auditions in May in central London 
Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December 
Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027
We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .
Please email details/reels  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

Yinon - an Israeli settler (late 20s-50s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on either 6th July or 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe in August and hopefully Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start in mid-May in Stratford and continue sporadically until the beginning of July and will take place on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

items.text:
CASTING 📸 do reklamy słodyczy szukamy: kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-40 lat. Łącznie mamy 7 ról głównych (role z tekstem). Fajny, komediowy scenariusz 😉 

Mile widziane wszelkie typy urody, sylwetki oraz różne fryzury, RÓŻNE KOLORY włosów ,  zarosty, wąsy… itp. 

💵 Wynagrodzenie 5000 zł. 
🎥 Zdjęcia: 26.05.2026, w Warszawie; zapewniamy zwrot kosztów podróży;  

‼️ZGŁOSZENIE: 

📧 wyślij w mailu na FILM@FILMTROJMIASTO.PL - z tytułem ,,REKLAMA SŁODYCZE” - podaj: 

🔸 imię nazwisko, wiek, miasto zamieszkania 
🔹 numer telefonu 
🔸 krótko opisz swoje doświadczenie reklamowe, filmowe, aktorskie, teatralne itp.
🔹 w załączniku jedno aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki z widoczną twarzą i aktualną fryzurą

‼️ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do wtorku, 5 maja. 

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami mailowo - wyślemy szczegóły oraz informacje co należy wysłać w ramach selftape (będzie to między innymi: video wizytówka + scenka).

items.text:
Chętnie podejmę współpracę jako statystka (początkująca)
Cześć! Chciałabym spróbować swoich sił jako statystka. Nie mam jeszcze doświadczenia, ale jestem osobą bardzo dyspozycyjną, cierpliwą i punktualną. Interesuje mnie praca w Warszawie i okolicy.

Kilka słów o mnie:

• Wiek: 16 lat

• Wzrost: 160 cm

• Oczy: Ciemnobrązowe, wyrazista oprawa oczu.

• Włosy: Ciemne, średniej długości 

• Znaki szczególne: Okulary korekcyjne, septum oraz kolczyk w brwi

Brak doświadczenia nadrabiam dużym zaangażowaniem i chęcią do nauki. Jeśli mój profil pasuje do jakiegoś projektu, zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu, A ja się do Was odezwę!!

Hallo zusammen,

anbei unsere neuen, spannenden Workshop-Angebote für Schauspieler*innen. Die Workshops "Stunt" und "Quereinsteiger" sind für alle Berufsgruppen zugänglich. 

Alle weiteren Infos unter folgendem Link: https://www.engelspost-management.com/workshops-coachings/workshops-und-weiterbildungen/

Wir freuen uns über Eure Anmeldungen.

Viele Grüße & Happy Weekend.

items.title: Hallo zusammen,

items.text:
# **Executive Producer** looking to connect with writers who want to tell more Latin American stories. 🎬

We already have crew, equipment, and locations ready to help bring the right 5–10 minute proof of concept to life. Also looking for directors — if you write + direct, that’s a huge plus.

This is bigger than one short film. The goal is to build real creative teams around strong storytellers so we can continue creating together long-term.

If you have a concept you’ve been sitting on, comment the logline below and I’ll reach out from there.

items.groupTitle: LA Actors, Agents, Casting Directors, Producers
items.summary:
# **Executive Producer** looking to connect with writers who want to tell more Latin American stories. 🎬

We already have crew, equipment, and locations ready to help bring the right 5–10 minute proof of concept to life. Also looking for directors — if you write + direct, that’s a huge plus.

This is bigger than one short film. The goal is to build real creative teams around strong storytellers so we can continue creating together long-term.

If you have a concept you’ve been sitting on, comment the logline below and I’ll reach out from there.
items.title: # **Executive Producer** looking to connect with writers who want to tell more Latin American stories. 🎬

🎬 ✨ भव्य घोषणा ✨ 🎬
आपल्याला कळविण्यात अत्यंत आनंद होत आहे की

लवकरच फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमधील कलाकार, तंत्रज्ञ आणि विविध क्षेत्रात कार्य करणाऱ्या सर्वांसाठी

एक नवीन आणि भव्य

🏛️ Association / Federation / Union किंवा महामंडळ

स्थापन करण्यात येत आहे.

🎭 कलाकार

🎬 तंत्रज्ञ

🎥 फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमध्ये कार्यरत सर्व व्यक्तींनी

आपले नाव नोंदणी करून या नव्या परिवाराचा भाग व्हावे.

🤝 आपल्या हक्कांसाठी • आपल्या प्रगतीसाठी • आपल्या एकतेसाठी

एक मजबूत व्यासपीठ निर्माण करण्याचा आमचा संकल्प.

🔥 पहिल्या 1000 सदस्यांसाठी सुवर्णसंधी 🔥

✨ सर्व इच्छुकांचे हार्दिक स्वागत आहे ✨

👤 रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख

🎬 फिल्म मेकर

📞 संपर्क : 98-5004-9002

🤝 आपल्या हक्कांसाठी • आपल्या प्रगतीसाठी • आपल्या एकतेसाठी

items.text: Hello everyone! I'm excited to be part of this group. I've been a performer since I was a child and I am an acting and performance coach. I hold workshops in the Aurora and Parker areas. In fact I have four seats left in a 5-hour intensive that I am offering this weekend, on Saturday the 9th.  I also provide private one-on-one and onset acting coaching, wherever that takes me. I'm terrible at networking and I want to expand my professional circle in the industry. DM me for more info on the intensive.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 EXTRAS NEEDED — As The Light Fades

We’re currently looking for extras in Colorado Springs and Denver to be a part of our upcoming psychological crime thriller.

Details:
• Unpaid / volunteer opportunity
• IMDb credit provided
• Filming in Colorado Springs & Denver
• No acting experience required

To apply:
Private message A.j. Bennett with:
• Headshot or recent photo
• Phone number
• Email address

Production begins this June.

#AsTheLightFades #CastingCall #ColoradoActors #IndieFilm #ExtrasCasting

items.text: Hey Friends! I'm a Casting Producer on a returning hit Kid's TV show and we are looking for dynamic teams of kid bakers ages 8-13! If you have skilled little bakers in your life, apply today cause we'd love to meet them.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Food Network is looking for the most talented TEAMS of SIBLINGS, COUSINS AND FRIENDS to compete to be the best BAKERS in the country! Do you think your kids were born to bake? Well if so, this is the perfect show for them! We are looking for kids between the ages of 8-14 who want to put their baking skills to the ultimate test! APPLY NOW! BAKINGCHAMPIONSHIP.COM *only subm submissions sent by parents will be accepted.'

topComments.text: Do they have to be skilled by y'all's standards or their standards? 🤣 My daughter would love to come and try but idk how it's gonna go

items.text:
👀 I see so many posts on my feed of parents looking for online classes for their home ed child, so I just wanted to tell you about a ***new provision we offer***! 🙌🏼✨

As well as booking individual subjects, you can now save some money by booking one of our packages! 📦📚

We have the following options available...
⭐️ **Starter Package** (English, maths & science) - £84 per month
⭐️ **Core Package** (English, maths, science, history & geography) - £130 per month
⭐️ **Expansion Package** (geography, history & world explorers) - £84 per month
⭐️ **GCSE Package** (English language, English literature, maths & science) - £150 per month

Available for KS1 up to GCSE support, and everything in between! 
Save up to 15% by booking as a package 😌
SEN/neurodivergent friendly 🌈
A subject can be switched out for a different subject if needed 🔀

Would anyone like a bit more info? 😊
Kind regards,
Aimee 
Swan Tutoring

items.text: Casting call for a student film - Casting has been completed

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says "Casting Call Write Up BNU Film Production students are looking for cast in an upcoming film. A post apocalyptic student short film following a girl as she awakes and tries to find her dad, whilst dealing with her uncle keeping a secret and zombies on the prowl. We are looking for actors who fit the following descriptions: Lucy (Playing age around 18) girl who wakes in the apocalypse and is determined to find her father. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th."

May be an image of text that says "Jim (Playing age 40s) Former military and current doomsday p person. Lucy's uncle who hides a secret from her. Must be available on May 8th, May 15th, May 22nd, and May 29th. John (Playing age 40s) Lucy's loving father. Must be available on May 15th Zombie (Playing age around 18) A zombie Lucy encounters. Must be available on May 22nd If you are interested email 22308662@bucks.ac.uk This will be unpaid work but transport and food on the shooting days will be covered. Shooting will take place at Buckinghamshire New University's High Wycombe campus."

items.text:
Hey everyone!

I’m building out a strong acting/modeling portfolio and could use some outside perspective.

I already have commercials and video work in my portfolio, but I’m dialing in the photo side and want honest input on what actually stands out for industry use.

Here’s a folder with all my raw images:

[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing)

If you’re open to helping:

• Open the folder in grid view  

• Scroll through and pick the strongest shots for acting/modeling  

• When you find one you like, open it and comment: YES  

Only mark the ones you genuinely think are strong. No need to go through everything.

If you can, try to keep it to your top 15–30 images.

Appreciate any time you put into this. Getting real outside feedback helps me narrow this down fast.

sharedPost.text:
ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ.

items.title: ***CASTING CALL***

items.text:
CASTING CALL – STUDENT SHORT FILM 🎬
We are looking for actors to be part of an exciting Afrikaans short film for a student production.

🎥 Project Type: Short Film

🗣 Language: Afrikaans

Roles:

We are casting for Afrikaans-speaking male characters. Due to the story and character backgrounds, these roles are written for Caucasian actors.

Requirements:

• Male actors

• Fluent in Afrikaans

• Passion for acting (experience is a bonus, not required)

This is a great opportunity to gain on-set experience and build your portfolio.

If you’re interested or know someone who might fit the roles, please get in touch for more details.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'we CASTING CALL are looking for for our upcoming male student actors film specifications Race: Race:Caucasian ·language: Afrikaans •Age between 20-40 (Note) This Film contains LGBTQ+ Themes and portrays a same sex romantic relationship 0-0766528071 Email-ileisilroductio@gmail.c'

items.text:
🎥 CASTING CALL – VOLUNTEER ACTORS WANTED (Johannesburg soweto)
Hello everyone 👋
My name is Karabelo and I am currently starting a small independent YouTube filmmaking project. I am looking for people who are interested in acting in a short film for experience and creativity.
This is not a paid job — it is a voluntary opportunity for anyone who wants to gain acting experience, be part of a creative project, and appear in a YouTube short film.
🎭 No acting experience is needed — beginners are welcome.
🎬 You will be guided during filming and helped with your lines.
FRO MORE INFORMATION 
WHATSAPP NUMBER::60 883 6584 
You can also call 📞

items.text:
Crew Call (Vertical Series) 
Hello everyone! 

Looking for crew for a few Vertical Series.

Each series is only a one day shoot. (Can express interest for just one, or multiple)

Will be shot within the Brisbane, Australia Area. 

Crew Needed: 
- Cinematographer  (own equipment)
- Sound Recordist
- Gaffer  (own equipment)
- Editor 

Please email a.to.z.infinite.8@gmail.com

Thanks! 

Food and snacks provided. 

UNPAID 
UNPAID

Hey guys! ITN Distribution has just released the trailer for Grizzly Attack on their YouTube channel! Definitely a really intense but very fun experience! Major shoutout to ChampDog Films, Louisa Warren and the rest of the cast and crew! Will keep you guys updated on the film’s release!

items.text:
🎬 Action Performer / Physical Actor (Hannover)

Hey, ich bin Nsimba (28) und baue aktuell gezielt meine Präsenz als physischer Performer im Bereich Film & Action auf.

Mein Fokus:

– dynamische Bewegung & Körperkontrolle  

– Fight / Action-orientierte Performance  

– starke visuelle Präsenz & Charakter  

Ich interessiere mich für:

– Filmprojekte (Action, Musikvideo, experimentell)  

– Fight Choreography / Stunt-Richtung  

– Kollaborationen mit kreativen Leuten  

– Filmemacher für Action-/Fight-Szenen

– Kontakte im Bereich Stunts / Performance

Ich bringe Energie, Ausdruck und die Bereitschaft, mich voll reinzugeben.

Wenn du an Projekten arbeitest oder in die Richtung gehst → meld dich 🤝

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

WE’RE HIRING 👑✨

Dream of performing? Love creating magic for children?
This is your sign 💫

We’re looking for confident, talented performers to join our team of professional princesses and entertainers.

Think you’ve got what it takes?

💌 casting@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk
📸 @fairytale_celebrationsuk
Fairytale Celebrations UK

items.text: FIRST THURSDAY IS FREE! Come have a go. 🙌🙌

sharedPost.text:
Can’t believe these guys have only been working on this routine for 4 classes! Many of them have never danced before and they’re already looking BRILLIANT! What really matters is that we’ve been having a great time and moving in a fun and feel-good way! 

Why not come along for a free session and see how my class makes you feel? 🥰🙌

Thursdays 7-8pm
(From 14/05, first class free, normal price £6)

Mondays 6.30-7.30pm
(First class just a £3 deposit, usual price £6)

DM me, or comment for more info. 

#exploreliverpool #feelfoodthursday #whynot #getstarted #fitnessmotivation

items.text:
ASAP CAST CALL – SHORT FILM (LONDON) FILMING TOMORROW | May 5
Hi everyone!

I’m currently putting together a team for a short psychological filmI’ll be shooting in London (Waterloo area).

This project is being created as part of my film school application, so I’m aiming for a strong, cinematic result with a clear visual style and atmosphere.

The story focuses on isolation, perception, and emotional tension, with a dark, intimate tone and character-driven storytelling.

LOOKING FOR:

1. FEMALE for a partner role. I will send script in DM

DETAILS:

• Location: London (WATERLOO)

• Shoot dates: (MAY 5)

• Casting ASAP

• This is an unpaid project, but:

◦ Travel expenses covered (within London)

◦ Food & drinks provided during shoot

◦ Full credit + material for your portfolio/showreel

WHAT I’M LOOKING FOR:

People who genuinely care about storytelling and want to create something visually and emotionally strong, even on a small-scale production.

TO APPLY:

Please send:

• Your portfolio / showreel

• Any relevant work

• A short message about your experience

You can comment below or message me directly.

Let’s create something powerful

items.text:
We are casting for 3 roles for our short film 'Lost Souls'. The film provides great opportunity for new and upcoming actors to test themselves in significant roles.

The film is about crack addition and the things crack addicts have to go through in order to get drugs including street prostitution.

This is non paid but you will be compensated with travel expenses and food. Plus you will also receive show reel material and a IMDB credit. The film will also feature in film festivals.

The film is a raw, unflinching and brutally honest portrayal of crack addition. We are looking for only actors who can 100% commit to their role and story lines .

Millie

Lead character, 25, white, feisty, streetwise, slim, crack addict, street prostitute. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Sienna

25, White, fun-loving, crack head, slim, street prostitute. Best friend of the lead character. London born although we will consider other areas of the UK.

Simulated sex scenes. No nudity. Will film with an intimacy coordinator.

Issie

21, naive, innocent, pretty, feminine, average build, crack user. Any ethnicity. Ethnicity not important.

Please reply to blondpublishing@gmail.com

Casting call for an english feature film "Saddle Ridge" ....paid Job.
Rawwtal OPC Pvt. Ltd. in association with
 The Garage House Films
 is casting for an  upcoming English-language Feature Film titled Saddle Ridge (Thriller/Horror), scheduled to be shot in "INDIA"  Delhi NCR and the foothills of the Himalayas in june/July 2026 for a duration of 20 days. 
The film is planned for international release in the United States (2027).
We are currently casting for the MAIN LEAD ROLES:
🔹 Lead Female
* Caucasian / White
* Age: 20–27
* Fluent English
* Comfortable with high-intensity thriller/horror performance scenes
Pay structure (paid)
🎬 Professional production setup.
Interested actors may send:
* Recent Headshots
* Acting Reel / Self-tape
* Resume/CV
* Current location & availability for June/Julyl
(Insert your submission email/contact here)
Serious and professional inquiries only.

Donovan T. W
Writer & Director
Rawwtal OPC Pvt. Ltd.

donovan.wodehouse@gmail.com
+918826729963

Abhijit Adhya
Writer & Director
The Garage House Films
abhijit.adhya@gmail.com
Contact us @  +91 98209 85380

We are looking for student and young film makers to make short or feature films. We have the studios props and uniforms if you have the passion and drive. All enquiries pls contact Atul Sharma Studio Manager tel 07534684735. West London I Heathrow area DolaAl DolaAl Dola AI'

items.text:
## 🎷 CASTING: Aktor/Saksofonista (19-28 lat)

Poszukujemy odtwórcy głównej roli do filmu krótkometrażowego. Projekt **płatny**.

**KOGO SZUKAMY?**
* Mężczyzna w wieku **19–21 lat**.
* **Umiejętność gry na saksofonie** (warunek konieczny).

**ZGŁOSZENIA:** Wyślij maila na adres: **korab.karo@gmail.com**

**W treści prosimy o:**
1. Imię, nazwisko i wiek.
2. Aktualne zdjęcia (twarz i sylwetka).
3. Krótkie nagranie (self-tape), na którym przedstawiasz się i grasz dowolny fragment na saksofonie.

sharedPost.text:
What Really Decides If a Movie Succeeds or Fails?
A movie's success isn't an accident. It's a system.
It starts with planning — before a single frame is shot, before a single rupee is spent.
A logline creates interest.
A synopsis makes people think.
A script makes them believe.
Marketing makes sure they know it exists.
But here's what most people get wrong —
It's not the hero.
A big name gives you strong openings. But openings don't decide the verdict. Content and audience do.
It's not just the story.
It's whether the audience connects with the story. A great story told wrong is a flop waiting to happen.
It's not the production house.
What matters is what kind of story you're telling — and who you're telling it to. Know your content. Know your audience.
It's not just marketing.
Marketing that reaches people is common. Marketing that makes people think, talk, and debate — that's rare. That's what moves tickets.
Timing matters more than people admit.
Release during IPL season on weekdays? Even the best marketing can't fill theatres. People have choices. Respect that.
Trending topics matter.
Public interest is already flowing somewhere. A smart film finds that current and rides it.
But ultimately — the audience decides.
There's a dialogue in Chak de India :
"To score a goal, don't focus on the goal — study the goalkeeper's mindset. Predict his move. Then the goal becomes easy."
Cinema works exactly the same way.
We have Navarasas — nine emotions. Tap into even one of them genuinely, and the audience feels something. When they feel something, they talk about it. When they talk about it, you have a hit.
Every scene matters.
Every character matters.
Keep the audience unpredictable — never let them guess what's coming.
Pull them inside the story.
Make them see themselves in a character.
Make them travel with the concept.
That's not filmmaking. That's connection.
And connection is the only currency that buys success.
What do you think decides a movie's fate — content, marketing, or something else entirely?
Drop your thoughts below. 👇
#Bollywood #hollywood #reel #AndhraPradesh

Actors needed for second - Fringe Festival
Date: Sep 29th - Oct 1
Time: Between 830-930pm. (Will be specified closer to time) 

Hi,
Seeking two actors who would be willing to do a segment for a couple seconds for my Fringe comedy show in September.

Role: During my show, I will be delivering a powerpoint on a TV projected from my phone/laptop. Your job would be to facetime me.

No specific script as ad libbing/improv allowed

Person 1, shirtless or in lingerie: Hey Erin, where are you?  

Screen pans to person 2, wearing a gimp/BDSM suit or similar.

Person 2: Yeah we’re all waiting.

I will promptly hang up.

Role is unpaid (or can discuss small fee), will be credited and happy to buy drinks/food for compensation.

Estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro

7 a 16 Maio
quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do 
Fórum Cultural do Seixal

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal
Biblioteca Municipal
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil. 
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde em, tantas partes do mundo se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans.

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

items.text:
They thought he disappeared for good.
They celebrated too early.
Because legends don’t vanish… they return stronger.
Every betrayal built the anger inside him.
Every scar became a reminder of what they did.
Now the city that once hunted him fears his name again.
Rain falls around him… but the fire inside never dies.
He’s not walking back for revenge alone.
He’s walking back to finish what they started.
The streets remember the chaos he left behind.
The enemies remember the fear in their lungs.
And tonight… that fear returns.
No more running.
No more hiding in the shadows.
This time the hunter became the storm.
Police lights flash behind him, but he never slows down.
Smoke fills the alley as he walks forward without fear.
Every step sounds like a warning.
Every second feels like the beginning of war.
He gave them one chance before… there won’t be another.
Now the same people who chased him… are running for their lives.
Would you stand beside him… or get out of his way? 🔥

items.text: Looking for someone with a good accent for a scene shooting at RJ props starting at 4:00 pm.  Hope to hear from you.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — ACCENT ROLE NEEDED 🎬

Quadrillionth TV is currently casting for a unique upcoming production and we are looking for someone with a REAL authentic accent or someone talented enough to naturally perform one on camera.

We are especially interested in:
🇨🇭 Swiss German
🇮🇪 Irish
🇦🇹 Austrian German
🌍 Other international accents are welcome too!

We’re searching for someone who is:
✨ Confident on camera
✨ Expressive and reliable
✨ 18+
✨ Ready to help bring a powerful character to life

This is for a tailored cinematic scene with a strong international feel and emotional presence. Male or female welcome, preferably female.

📍 Location: RJ Props
📅 Thursday, May 7th, 2026
🕓 4PM – 9PM

If you or someone you know has a great accent and would love to be part of an exciting creative production, send us a message or RSVP at:

📩 honestearthsolutions@gmail.com

Please share this post and tag anyone who might fit the role! 🎥✨

items.text:
CASTING

ROLE - ATTACKER DAX

The attacker version of the lead male, he is masked the entire show and his face is never revealed. 

FULL LENGTH SUSPENSEFUL ROMANTIC HORROR PLAY.

Looking for someone Male, slim/muscly, 6ft 2” or 6ft 3” with brown hair to match the lead male.

Ethnicity: White 

Required Media: Headshot/Photo, Video Reel, Cover Letter

LONDON, UK ONLY.

ALL INFORMATION ON THE POSTER

Payment - Profit share, equal split between all 3 actors and the backstage crew/tech.

Dates - Rehearsals every week on a Sunday from June (dates to be confirmed), 2 week run in a London theatre (or 2) over Halloween (exactly dates to follow).

To apply send a DM or email info@distortedrebels.com

items.text:
**Rose Waite Studio** is looking for a man and his dog for a commercial. We’re specifically looking for someone with a friendliness, softness and warmth. *60s - early 70s, open to all ethnicities. *

**Fitting:** 21st May (London)

**Filming: **27th / 28th May (London)

Talent must be based in London or surrounding areas.

No previous experience needed to apply. Paid opportunity.

To apply, please email **[stories@rosewaite.com](mailto:stories@rosewaite.com)** with the subject ‘Commercial - Man and Dog’.

Please include:

Name / Location / Selfie

A picture of your dog

A few lines about you both

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)
Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:

• Approaching people

• Asking fun / engaging questions

• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:

• 2–3 hour shoot

• £80–£100 paid

• London location

Ideal for:

• Drama students

• Aspiring presenters

• Content creators

Must have:

• Strong energy

• Natural speaking style

• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:

Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Casting is now open for the role of YOUNGER for our upcoming short film "Hoops Edge" written and directed by Kwamé Kandekore and co-directed by Jordan Aaron.

YOUNGER, is a 13 year old boy with a passion, basketball. We are looking for a young boy with a lot of energy and sensibility. 

If you play/have played basketball (or not but willing to learn more) we want to hear from you! 

We will be shooting in London in August 2026. This is an unpaid role but expenses and catering will be covered. 

Interested? Email us at onetoomanyprod@gmail.com with your name, a recent picture of you, where you are based, a brief description and if you play the sport: a short video of you throwing some hoops! 

Let’s get rolling 🏀

Thank you, 

One Too Many Productions

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute für einen Dreh am Wochende 09.05.26 und 10.05.26 für unseren Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Spielfilm, hätten wir noch eine Rolle mit Dialog zu vergeben, es handelt sich um einen unserer bösen Zwerge. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald im Landkreis Freyung Grafenau. Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

Casting Models! 

✨ ON THE SPOT LIGHT ✨ @sienamay_official 

Introducing the beautiful and talented Siena May Tulloch from the United Kingdom 🇬🇧 featured by Matilda Model Magazine.
📸 Model: Siena May Tulloch
📱 Instagram: @sienamay_official
🎂 12 Years Old
📍 United Kingdom
📷 Photography: Dani Geddes
Siena May, 12, from Kent, UK, brings a vibrant and creative energy wherever she goes, paired with a natural flair in front of the camera. With a confident presence and expressive style, she effortlessly captures attention in every photoshoot.
Beyond modeling, Siena enjoys swimming and spending quality time with family and friends. She has a deep love for animals and a unique creative passion for designing Halloween makeup looks, where her imagination truly shines.
With her lively personality and artistic spirit, Siena is a rising young talent with a bright future in the world of fashion and creativity. ✨ She is featured in Matilda Magazine for Models & Talents all ages and all around the globe. @matildamodelmagazine available in our website www.mylittlematilda.net

items.text:
Casting Call – Vancouver Laser & Skin Care Centre
Hi everyone!

We are currently casting **one female talent** for a series of educational videos for our new website.

## **Role Needed**
* **Role:** Female talent
* **Age:** 30-50
* **Ethnicity:** Caucasian
* **Language:** Native-level English fluency
* **Preferred (not required):** Experience filming educational, corporate, or introduction-style videos

## **Project Details**
* **Deliverables: **25 videos (approx. 1 minute each)
* **Shoot Duration:** 3 - 4 hours (approx.)
* **Shoot Date:** One day between **May 6 – 15** (Exact date can be discussed)
* **Wardrobe & Makeup:** Not provided. Please wear light-colored business-casual attire.

## **Compensation**
* **$1,000 flat rate**
* **Snacks & coffee provided**

## **How to Apply**

Please email the following to **ben@vancouverlaser.com **

**Subject line:** *Website Video + [Your Name]*

**Please include:**
* Recent headshot taken within the last 6 months
* Resume
* Demo videos (if available)

**Please note: Facebook DMs will not be accepted.**

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.
We look forward to your submissions!

items.text:
Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for:

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 50-68

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 30-49

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face on camera. One of the products is a beard moisturizer, so please apply if you keep a clean shaved face OR a short beard that will not be shaved off. 

Location: TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 per talent for approximately 2-3 hours. 

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

• Your location

Subject line: “product video casting”

items.text:
Something BIG is coming for 3 of our students… 
We’ve got some seriously exciting news behind the scenes here at Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & our Talent Agency… and trust us, you’re going to want to watch this space.

After already seeing our incredible Summer-Joules step into a lead role (yes, we’re still bursting with pride 💫), even MORE amazing opportunities have landed on our doorstep… and they’re just as exciting.
We can’t spill all the details just yet… but let’s just say, this is EPIC for our students and actors 🎬🔥
Stay tuned… all will be revealed very soon 👀

#WatchThisSpace #MajesticAcademy #BigThingsComing #YoungTalent #CastingOpportunities

sharedPost.text:
Hello everyone!

**Location: Poland, Lublin**

Exhibition **June 6-7**

I'm looking for **actors** for a performance. A** slim woman of any age**, preferably an actress with no allergies to body paint.

Terms: **TFP**

This isn't a commercial art project. In exchange for participating, I can take a few professional, classic photos for your portfolio for free.

Examples of past performances from my exhibitions can be found in the attached photos.

items.text:
MALE PROFESSIONAL DANCER WANTED
New Cabaret Opening – French Riviera (South of France)

We are excited to announce the upcoming opening of a large-scale cabaret in the Alpes-Maritimes (French Riviera), and we are currently seeking:

1 Male Professional Dancer

• Minimum height: 180 cm (5’11”) 

• Athletic physique 

• Strong stage presence and artistic maturity 

• Solid training in classical ballet and jazz dance required 

Contract: Fixed-term contract (CDD) with potential for long-term (CDI)

Rehearsal period: June – July 2026

We are looking for a dedicated, disciplined, and passionate performer ready to be part of an ambitious and high-quality production.

To apply:

Please send your CV,photos  cover letter and showreel (video) to:

📩 duoenchantment@yahoo.com

We’re looking for a charismatic female host for long-term collaboration 🙏✨

Format:

Host/presenter for:

-Instagram Stories

-Instagram channel / Reels

-Telegram channel

Responsibilities:

-Recording videos based on scripts

-Announcements

-Behind-the-scenes content

-Lifestyle content / audience interaction

Requirements:

-Female, 18–30

-Attractive appearance, well-groomed

-Confident on camera, charismatic, with lively energy

-Clear diction and a pleasant voice

Languages:

-Fluent Russian

-English (preferably without a strong accent)

On-camera experience is a plus (blogging, hosting, acting)

Collaboration format:

-Regular shoots

-Long-term contract

-Work based on content plans and scripts

If you’re interested, send me a DM 🙏

DZIEŃ ZDJĘCIOWY - 8.05

CHARAKTERYZACJA - 6.05

Do filmu fabularnego szukam 2 dublerów. 
Wg obecnego draftu do jednej sceny od ok. godz. 10. 

- 1 Pan - wzrost 178-182 cm, rozmiar odzieży 48-50, buty 41-42 - włosy w odcieniu ciemnego blondu  (2 pierwsze zdjęcia)
- 2 Pan - wzrost 176-180 cm, rozmiar odzieży M, buty 40-41 - włosy w odcieniu ciemnego blondu (3 zdjęcie)

Stawka - 220 zł (dzień zdjęciowy 170zł + charakteryzacja 50zł)

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: DUBLER 
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wymiary, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy, tyłu głowy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 19/2026

GESCHICHTSUNTERRICHT, JAMES CAMERON GOES POP UND VERSCHWUNDENE KINOS

Vor 80 Jahren fanden die Nürnberger Strafprozesse statt. Das starbesetzte Historiendrama NÜRNBERG beleuchtet diese ganz speziell.

James Cameron revolutionierte die 3D Technik,  tauchte hinab zum Wrack der Titanic. Nun setzt er neue Maßstäbe gemeinsam mit Billie Eilish.

Die Hochblütezeit der Kinos war von 1950 bis Mitte der 1970er. Danach verschwanden immer mehr Kinos auf der niederösterreichischen Landkarte.  Unsere Moderatorin sprach mit Autor Karl Zellhofer über dieses Phänomen.

Musikalisch gibts diesmal ein best of der bekanntesten Filmsongs der letzten 80 Jahre. 

Mittwoch 6.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
**NOW CASTING: POLY LOVE**

TV Producers are searching for polyamorous and poly-curious people to star in their own TV Docu-series!

* *Are you in a relationship and are curious about exploring polyamory?*
* *Are you already in a polyamorous relationship?*

 

Whether you’re part of an existing **THROUPLE, QUAD, or PENTAD** OR you’re **newly exploring polyamory,***** WE WANT TO HEAR FROM YOU!***

**To be considered or to nominate a family, please email polytvcasting@gmail.com with the following info:**

1. Your Name(s) and Location.

2. Contact info.

3. Tell us a little bit about your family and your lives.

4. Attach some family photos.

5. Include any social media links that can help us get to know you better.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Casting is now open for the role of YOUNGER for our upcoming short film "Hoops Edge" written and directed by Kwamé Kandekore and co-directed by Jordan Aaron.

YOUNGER, is a 13 year old boy with a passion, basketball. We are looking for a young boy with a lot of energy and sensibility. 

If you play/have played basketball (or not but willing to learn more) we want to hear from you! 

We will be shooting in London in August 2026. This is an unpaid role but expenses and catering will be covered. 

Interested? Email us at onetoomanyprod@gmail.com with your name, a recent picture of you, where you are based, a brief description and if you play the sport: a short video of you throwing some hoops! 

Let’s get rolling 🏀

Thank you, 

One Too Many Productions

items.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.

You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette

Science Boffins

Science Boffins

Adult Panto Jack OFF The Beanstalk  is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

 

We are now casting for the following roles only

 

Jack Trott

We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.

Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

 

 

Dame Trott - Male

We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab

Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

 

Billy Trott  -Male

We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother

Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

 

 

The Dates

Auditions in May in central London

Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December

Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027

We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

 

Billy Trott  -Male

We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother

Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

 

 

The Dates

Auditions in May in central London

Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December

Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027

We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO

items.previewDescription: Play is an essential way of learning about the world. Doing things we enjoy without a goal in mind leads us to find new information, better understand our own capabilities, and find unexpected beauty around us. Arithmetic is one example of an area we can explore through play.

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

items.text: To All Man

sharedPost.text:
Man-World _Created To Rule.🤴👑
.
.
➡️In the annals of history, there exists a powerful truth etched deep within the essence of man: he is created to lead, to conquer, and to claim his rightful dominion. Yet, too often, this inherent greatness falters in the shadows of doubt, complacency, and fear. A man who was born to rule carries within him an innate fire, yet it is his responsibility to ignite it, to rise above the noise of the world that seeks to undermine his potential.

The journey to greatness is not for the faint of heart. It demands courage, a willingness to embrace the struggle and to confront the obstacles that lie ahead. Every man possesses the strength to seize his destiny, yet many find themselves shackled by insecurities and hesitation. This is where the true battle begins—not against external forces but within oneself.

To those who feel the weight of unfulfilled potential, remember this: it is not the absence of fear that defines a ruler, but the ability to act in spite of it. Every setback is a lesson, every failure a stepping stone toward achieving the greatness that is your birthright. The world needs strong men—men who are unyielding in their pursuit of purpose, who understand that true power lies not in domination, but in the integrity, resilience, and vision with which they lead.

Embrace the fire within. Rise from the ashes of doubt and claim what is yours with unwavering conviction. The time for action is now. Stand tall, face your challenges with determination, and let your reign be defined not by your fears, but by your relentless pursuit of your dreams. The universe is waiting for you to step into your power and to create the legacy only you can forge.

You are destined to rule; make it happen. The world is yours to shape.
#man #spirit #body #soul #worldwide

items.summary: SE HER HVAD SELFCAST KAN GØRE FOR DIG !!!
items.title: SE HER HVAD SELFCAST KAN GØRE FOR DIG !!!

items.text:
🌟SKUESPILLERE SØGES🌟
Har du en skuespiller gemt i maven eller kender du én som vil øve sit skuespil foran kamera? Så er det lige præcis dig vi leder efter!🫵🏼
Vi er fire medievidenskabsstuderende fra Syddansk Universitet som søger skuespillere (både hovedroller samt mindre statistroller med og uden replikker) til vores eksamens-kortfilm “Den aften” med optagelser på Nordsjælland i slutningen af maj. Hvad vi søger:

🎬Hovedrolle 1: Magnus; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
🎬Hovedrolle 2: Lauge; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
(OBS: læs nedenstående casting-call, da rollerne har nogle intime scener)

🎬Birolle 1: Teresse, 22-26 (Langt lyst hår)
🎬Yderligere statister: agere gæster til en havefest (alle aldre og køn er velkomne)

PRAKTISK INFORMATION: 
📆Optagelserne finder sted på Nordsjælland i nærheden af Allerød d. 23 maj (for alle) + den 24. maj (for hovedrollerne + birollen).  (Tidsrummet af arbejdsdagen(e) varierer på baggrund af hvilken rolle(r) du ønsker at besætte).

💰
Jobbet er ulønnet, men vi sørger for forplejning på set.

LYDER DET SOM NOGET FOR DIG❓
Så skal du sende en ansøgning med:
🌟Navn
🌟Alder
🌟Hvilke(n) rolle du ønsker at ansøge til
🌟Vedhæfte et billede af dig selv (nærbillede + totalbillede) 
🌟Skuespillererfaring (ikke påkrævet men ét stort plus)
🌟Telefonnummer
🌟Hvor I landet du er bosat

Disse informationer skal sendes til vores caster & skuespiller-ansvarlige: Line Møller Ipsen på følgende mail: Linelmi12@gmail.com - Ansøgningsfrist:  d. 10 maj kl. 12.00. 

Har du yderligere spørgsmål, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til Line over Messenger eller via mail - så vil du blive kontaktet indenfor alm. kontortid.  

Opslaget må meget gerne deles, så vi kan finde de helt rette til at besætte rollerne til vores afsluttende eksamen.

TUSIND TAK PÅ FORHÅND 🩵
Holdet bag “Den aften”
Johan, Line, Niklas & Sara

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting cai Den afien Finder sted til Lauge og Teresses forlovelsesfest pả Nordsjaelland. Lauge har nogle máneder forinden haft en seksuel erfaere med sin kammarart Magnus. Magnus har sveert ved at slippe tanken om Lauge og mere specefikt den aften. For hvordan kan han pludselig veeret forlovet og ovenikobet med en kvinde? HOVEDPERSONERNE ROLLERNE TIL MAGNUS OG LAUGE VIL HAVE INTIME SCENER HERUNDER KYS OG SCENER I LETPÄKLEDT TOJ. Hvis du onsker at vide mere, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til vores caster samt skuespiller ansvarlige Line Moller Ipsen. HOLDET BAG DEN AFTEN'

items.text:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

topComments.text: Hatte ich oben vergessen: Drehorte, die infrage kommen, sind entweder Berlin oder die Region um Bayreuth, an einem Wochenende im August oder September (genauer Termin steht noch nicht).
